'''Tiragga''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="QM" /> of the [[Tiragga system/Legends|Tiragga system]], in the [[Mieru'kar sector/Legends|Mieru'kar sector]], located within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> The planet was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by at least two [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. The [[Second moon of Tiragga|second]] moon was home to a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Tiragga Alliance outpost|outpost]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a large conflict between the Alliance and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. At some point during the conflict, the base personnel became infected with the [[Direllian Plague]], a [[Death/Legends|fatal]] disease that could only be cured with the administration of [[Shiarha Root]], a rare [[Plant/Legends|plant]] found on the world of [[Kirtania]].<ref name="QM" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tiragga was first mentioned in the roleplaying game adventure ''[[The Quality of Mercy]]'', written by [[Nicky Rea]] and published in [[February]] [[1994]] within the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1|first issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''. In the adventure, players journey to [[Kirtania]] in an attempt to acquire a cure for the Direllian Plague that is killing the Rebel base's personnel.<ref name="QM" /> The [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion]] placed the Tiragga [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Tiragga, in grid square N-3.<ref name="TEA-OC" />
